summary: This Vision Zero indicator is reported using DOT's speed-hump and speed-cushion installation data. DOT's own reporting attributes FY24's record total of 443 to the deployment of additional installation crews on Saturdays that year; FY25's total of 224 is more in line with typical annual output once that extra Saturday crew deployment wasn't repeated, rather than reflecting a cutback in the Vision Zero traffic-calming program.

sources.label: NYC Department of Transportation, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
